# Convergence Daily

Real Convergence Daily episodes published through the dual-native engine.

## Machine Surface
- Trust contract: https://convergence.permanentupperclass.com/o/trust.json
- Object index: https://convergence.permanentupperclass.com/o/index.json
- Claim index: https://convergence.permanentupperclass.com/o/claims.json
- Alias index: https://convergence.permanentupperclass.com/o/aliases.json
- API catalog: https://convergence.permanentupperclass.com/.well-known/api-catalog
- Optional live API overlay: https://convergence.permanentupperclass.com/api/
- Optional MCP overlay: https://convergence.permanentupperclass.com/mcp

## Access
- Policy: latest_per_iso_week
- Paid objects are signed and served as teaser canonical objects.
